'''Garginoolaara''', or '''Gargi''' for short, grew up in the [[Roche asteroid field]]. Many of his modifications were deemed too dangerous, even for the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] themselves, and he was cast out by his hive. He wandered [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] until he met [[Fiz Cor'gril]], who recognized his abilities and hired him to work in his [[Starship/Legends|starship]] dealership. He kept Fizzi's merchandise in top condition, and sometimes a little better than that.<ref name="AJ9" />

==Personality and traits==
He had a natural inquisitiveness and inventiveness that led him to tinker more than his peers. Gargi was quiet and kept to himself mostly, although he was friendly with [[Shanna Kinn]] and the droid [[R5-M1]].<ref name="AJ9" />
